endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Automation/automationAccounts/{automationAccountName}/schedules
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{AUTOMATIONACCOUNTNAME}} with a real automationaccountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Automation/automationAccounts/{automationAccountName}/schedules/{scheduleName}
endpoints.description: Retrieve the schedule identified by schedule name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{AUTOMATIONACCOUNTNAME}} with a real automationaccountname. Replace {{SCHEDULENAME}} with a real schedulename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

Replace {{AUTOMATIONACCOUNTNAME}} with a real automationaccountname. Replace {{SCHEDULENAME}} with a real schedulename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
